name: task_update_context
description: Update an existing context source on a task by its index. Replaces the context entry at the specified position with the new type and data. Use task_get to inspect the current context_sources array and determine the correct index before updating.

task_id.description: Unique identifier of the task containing the context to update

context_index.description: Zero-based index of the context source to update in the task's context_sources array

context_type.description: Updated type of the context source

context_data.description: Updated typed context data for the source

examples.name: Update GitHub context with PR information
Update custom context with new findings
